title: Indigo
description: An indigo-coloured 16x PVP resource pack with custom swords, tools and HUD in 1.21!
body:
# **Indigo 16x**

## An Indigo-coloured texture pack inspired by 1.8.9 PVP! in 1.21!

![All modified textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c4f20a3538ae1f50073cc746856cde68e6f0a98.png)

## Features: 
1. **Custom/Themed swords**
2. **Custom tools**
3. **Transparent HUD textures**

**Sword textures inspired from looshy's prism 16x.**

This is something I really wanted to make since there's little to none 1.8.9 PVP-styled resource packs for 1.21. The pack is rudimentary but it changes the things that matter in PVP-packs. Enjoy!

**USE THE TEXTURES AS YOU WANT, BUT CREDIT NEEDED.**

_Yes I made this so I can use it on skyblock :3_
